author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: Fixed reshape forward to use view_operation (zero-copy shared storage + grad_fn) for both CPU and GPU, matching flatten/squeeze/unsqueeze pattern. Removed the buggy GPU early-return that discarded autograd metadata. Also fixed 4 shape backward functions (ReshapeBackward, FlattenBackward, SqueezeBackward, UnsqueezeBackward) to use view_reshape instead of ensure_cpu/restore_device roundtrips — these are pure metadata changes that never need GPU→CPU transfers. All 574 core tests pass.
